revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}|0|0|{{#expr: {{NUMBEROF|EDITS|{{{1}}}}}*({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}-{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}})^2/({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}*{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}^2) round {{{2|1}}}}}}} This template shows the [[:meta:Wikipedia article depth|depth]] of Wikipedia section: * Usage: {{Depth|en}} → {{Depth|en}} * Usage: {{Depth|ru}} → {{Depth|ru}} The required parameter is the code of the Wikipedia section (e.g., "en" for English, "de" for German, etc.). By default the result is rounded to 1 digit after dot.
Optional second parameter allows to specify another number of digits: * Usage: {{Depth|en|0}} → {{Depth|en|0}} * Usage: {{Depth|en|3}} → {{Depth|en|3}} [[Category:Wikipedia statistics]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Wikipedia statistics
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}|0|0|{{#expr: {{NUMBEROF|EDITS|{{{1}}}}}*({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}-{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}})^2/({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}*{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}^2) round {{{2|1}}}}}}} This template shows the [[:meta:Wikipedia article depth|depth]] of Wikipedia section: * Usage: {{Depth|en}} → {{Depth|en}} * Usage: {{Depth|ru}} → {{Depth|ru}} The required parameter is the code of the Wikipedia section (e.g., "en" for English, "de" for German, etc.). By default the result is rounded to 1 digit after dot.
Optional second parameter allows to specify another number of digits: * Usage: {{Depth|en|0}} → {{Depth|en|0}} * Usage: {{Depth|en|3}} → {{Depth|en|3}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}|0|0|{{#expr: {{NUMBEROF|EDITS|{{{1}}}}}*({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}-{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}})^2/({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}*{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}^2) round {{{2|1}}}}}}} This template shows the [[:meta:Wikipedia article depth|depth]] of Wikipedia section: * Usage: {{Depth|en}} → {{Depth|en}} * Usage: {{Depth|ru}} → {{Depth|ru}} The required parameter is the code of the Wikipedia section (e.g., "en" for English, "de" for German, etc.). By default the result is rounded to 1 digit after dot.
Optional second parameter allows to specify another number of digits: * Usage: {{Depth|en|0}} → {{Depth|en|0}} * Usage: {{Depth|en|3}} → {{Depth|en|3}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{#ifeq: {{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}|0|0|{{#expr: {{NUMBEROF|EDITS|{{{1}}}}}*({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}-{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}})^2/({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}*{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}^2) round {{{2|1}}}}}}} This template shows the [[:meta:Wikipedia article depth|depth]] of Wikipedia section: * Usage: {{Depth|en}} → {{Depth|en}} * Usage: {{Depth|ru}} → {{Depth|ru}} The required parameter is the code of the Wikipedia section (e.g., "en" for English, "de" for German, etc.). By default the result is rounded to 1 digit after dot.
Optional second parameter allows to specify another number of digits: * Usage: {{Depth|en|0}} → {{Depth|en|0}} * Usage: {{Depth|en|3}} → {{Depth|en|3}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}|0|0|{{#expr: {{NUMBEROF|EDITS|{{{1}}}}}*({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}-{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}})^2/({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}*{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}^2) round {{{2|1}}}}}}} This template shows the [[:meta:Wikipedia article depth|depth]] of Wikipedia section: * Usage: {{Depth|en}} → {{Depth|en}} * Usage: {{Depth|ru}} → {{Depth|ru}} The required parameter is the code of the Wikipedia section (e.g., "en" for English, "de" for German, etc.). By default the result is rounded to 1 digit after dot.
Optional second parameter allows to specify another number of digits: * Usage: {{Depth|en|0}} → {{Depth|en|0}} * Usage: {{Depth|en|3}} → {{Depth|en|3}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}|0|0|{{#expr: {{NUMBEROF|EDITS|{{{1}}}}}*({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}-{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}})^2/({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}*{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}^2) round {{{2|1}}}}}}} This template shows the [[:meta:Wikipedia article depth|depth]] of Wikipedia section: * Usage: {{Depth|en}} → {{Depth|en}} * Usage: {{Depth|ru}} → {{Depth|ru}} The required parameter is the code of the Wikipedia section (e.g., "en" for English, "de" for German, etc.). By default the result is rounded to 1 digit after dot.
Optional second parameter allows to specify another number of digits: * Usage: {{Depth|en|0}} → {{Depth|en|0}} * Usage: {{Depth|en|3}} → {{Depth|en|3}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}|0|0|{{#expr: {{NUMBEROF|EDITS|{{{1}}}}}*({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}-{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}})^2/({{NUMBEROF|PAGES|{{{1}}}}}*{{NUMBEROF|ARTICLES|{{{1}}}}}^2) round {{{2|1}}}}}}} This template shows the [[:meta:Wikipedia article depth|depth]] of Wikipedia section: * Usage: {{Depth|en}} → {{Depth|en}} * Usage: {{Depth|ru}} → {{Depth|ru}} The required parameter is the code of the Wikipedia section (e.g., "en" for English, "de" for German, etc.). By default the result is rounded to 1 digit after dot.
Optional second parameter allows to specify another number of digits: * Usage: {{Depth|en|0}} → {{Depth|en|0}} * Usage: {{Depth|en|3}} → {{Depth|en|3}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

By default the result is rounded to 1 digit after dot.
Optional second parameter allows to specify another number of digits: * Usage: {{Depth|en|0}} → {{Depth|en|0}} * Usage: {{Depth|en|3}} → {{Depth|en|3}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Depth here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

By default the result is rounded to 1 digit after dot.
Optional second parameter allows to specify another number of digits: * Usage: {{Depth|en|0}} → {{Depth|en|0}} * Usage: {{Depth|en|3}} → {{Depth|en|3}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
